title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: WALLOWA COUNTY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric, gas, heating fuel, and water payments. 702 NW First Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Must meet income limits Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 426-3840 1202 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 426-3840 Main phone Person (541) 426-3840 ext 1202 Taylor Harshfield [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - PUBLIC TRANSIT TRANSPORTATION - VETERAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA COUNTY
